settings.heading: Crystal Trophy Price in India
settings.subheading: What do crystal trophies cost in India? A clear price guide for K9 optical-crystal awards by size and design — from compact recognition pieces to large statement trophies. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: In India, crystal trophies range from about ₹350 for compact awards to ₹8,000+ for large premium pieces, depending on size, crystal grade and engraving. Bulk discounts from 25 units. Meru Trophy quotes exact prices on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252).

settings.heading: What you'll pay and why
settings.text: Crystal pricing depends on size, crystal grade (K9 optical), shape complexity and engraving. Compact recognition awards start around ₹350; standard corporate awards ₹750; premium statement pieces ₹2,500; and large custom crystal ₹8,000+. Logo engraving (including sub-surface 3D) is included. (See also crystal vs acrylic.)

settings.question: How much is a crystal trophy in India?
settings.answer: From about ₹350 for compact awards to ₹8,000+ for large premium pieces, before bulk discounts.

settings.question: Is logo engraving extra on crystal?
settings.answer: No — laser and sub-surface 3D logo engraving are included with your order.

settings.question: Crystal vs acrylic price?
settings.answer: Acrylic is cheaper and lighter; crystal is more premium. See our comparison.

settings.question: Do bulk crystal orders get discounts?
settings.answer: Yes — per-piece pricing improves from 25 units and again at 100+.

settings.heading: Want an exact price?
settings.text: Send your item, quantity and engraving — we'll send a precise quote, usually within the hour.
